expectations.text: Uses u3-rt-pro model (not older streaming models)
expectations.evidence: No model specified — uses default (likely older universal-streaming model)

expectations.text: Sets max_turn_silence explicitly (not relying on LiveKit default of 100ms)
expectations.evidence: No max_turn_silence set — relies on LiveKit default of 100ms which is too aggressive
Line 132: min_endpointing_delay=0.8 — adds 800ms delay on top of STT endpointing
Uses default Silero VAD (0.5 threshold) with no AssemblyAI vad_threshold set — mismatch creates dead zone
Uses deprecated word_boost parameter instead of keyterms_prompt
No turn_detection specified — uses default VoicePipelineAgent behavior

expectations.text: Does not use deprecated word_boost parameter
expectations.evidence: Line 47: word_boost=[...] with boost_param='high' — this is the deprecated parameter name
